title: Login page returns 500 error when email contains a plus sign
description: Users with emails like jane+work@example.com get a 500 Internal Server Error on the login page. The server logs show an unescaped character in the email validation regex. This affects roughly 2% of signups based on our analytics.

title: Dashboard CSV export includes deleted records
description: When exporting dashboard data to CSV, rows that were soft-deleted still appear in the export. The query in export_service.py does not filter on the is_deleted flag. Expected behavior: only active records should be included.

title: Add dark mode support across the platform
description: Multiple customers have requested dark mode. This would require updating the design system tokens, all component themes, and adding a user preference toggle. We should also consider OS-level preference detection.

title: Tooltip text is truncated on the billing summary page
description: The tooltip on the 'Total charges' row in the billing summary gets cut off when the text is longer than 40 characters. Likely a CSS max-width issue on the tooltip container. Screenshot attached in the original issue.

title: Refactor notification service to use event-driven architecture
description: Our current notification service uses synchronous HTTP calls to send emails and push notifications. We should migrate to an event-driven model using a message queue. This will improve reliability and decouple services. Requires evaluating RabbitMQ vs Kafka and updating 4-5 downstream consumers.

title: Fix broken pagination on the audit log page
description: The audit log page shows only the first 25 entries and the 'Next' button does nothing. Console shows a JS error: 'Cannot read property offset of undefined'. The pagination component works on other pages, so this is likely a prop-passing issue specific to the audit log view.

title: Investigate slow response times on the /api/reports endpoint
description: The /api/reports endpoint is averaging 4.2s response time, up from 800ms last quarter. Needs investigation. Could be a missing index, an N+1 query, or increased data volume. No clear root cause yet.

title: Update error messages to follow new copy guidelines
description: Product and content teams published new error message guidelines (see Confluence doc). We need to update all user-facing error strings to match the new tone and format. There are approximately 80+ error messages across 12 modules.

title: Webhook retry logic does not respect exponential backoff
description: The webhook delivery system retries failed webhooks every 10 seconds regardless of failure count. It should use exponential backoff: 10s, 30s, 90s, 270s. The retry logic is in webhook_dispatcher.py line 45. Currently it hardcodes the interval.

title: Build a Slack integration for real-time alert notifications
description: We want to send alert notifications to customer Slack channels. This requires building an OAuth flow for Slack, a channel selector UI, message formatting templates, and a delivery pipeline. Should support both public and private channels.
